nasb.text: So the Pharisees said to one another, “You see that you are not doing any good; look, the world has gone after Him.”

esv.text: So the Pharisees said to one another, “You see that you are gaining nothing. Look, the world has gone after him.”

cnv.text: 於是法利賽人彼此說：“你們看，你們都是徒勞無功，世人都去跟隨他了！”

ccb.text: 法利赛人彼此议论说：“我们真是枉费心思！你看，整个世界都跟着祂跑了。”

csbs.text: 于是法利赛人互相说：“可见你们真没用！看，这世界都跟随他去了。”
